species: we have developed a large public database of the human O-glycoproteome
tissue: we report a comprehensive map of GalNAc-type O-glycoproteins from neuronal tissues and cell lines
cell_type: we report a comprehensive map of GalNAc-type O-glycoproteins from neuronal tissues and cell lines
disease_state: Impairments in protein glycosylation... are linked to severe developmental disorders
sample_source: Human (prostate and CSF) as well as non-human neuronal tissues
cell_line: We selected the catecholaminergic neuroblastoma cell line SH-SY5Y
strain: murine synaptosomes were isolated from flash-frozen cortical tissue from C57BL/6J (Jackson Laboratory) background mice
